sql: SELECT u1.email, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 LIMIT 41
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.liked_at, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 ORDER BY l1.user_id
SELECT l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id >= 615
SELECT u1.email, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id = 692
SELECT c1.user_id, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1 ORDER BY c1.id
SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.created_at, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id <= 886
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at <= DATETIME('now', '-23 days') ORDER BY l1.user_id
SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id = 856
SELECT u1.country_code FROM users AS u1 ORDER BY u1.username
SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1
SELECT p1.content FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.user_id < 485
SELECT c1.id, c1.post_id, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1
SELECT p1.id FROM posts AS p1 ORDER BY p1.view_count LIMIT 28
SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.content, p1.id, p1.view_count FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.view_count = 379
SELECT u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.is_verified = 0
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 ORDER BY u1.email LIMIT 68
SELECT c1.id, c1.user_id, c1.post_id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 ORDER BY c1.id
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 RIGHT JOIN comments AS c7 ON p1.id = c7.post_id WHERE c7.post_id <> 707
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 FULL JOIN users AS u2 ON f1.follower_id = u2.id
SELECT l5.liked_at, u1.signup_date, l5.post_id, l5.user_id FROM users AS u1 LEFT JOIN likes AS l5 ON u1.id = l5.user_id WHERE l5.post_id <= 633
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 INNER JOIN posts AS p2 ON u1.id = p2.user_id
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 LEFT JOIN users AS u9 ON c1.user_id = u9.id WHERE u9.id < 933
SELECT u4.username, u4.country_code, c1.post_id, u4.email FROM comments AS c1 INNER JOIN users AS u4 ON c1.user_id = u4.id
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 FULL JOIN users AS u1 ON f1.follower_id = u1.id
SELECT c1.post_id, u2.username, c1.id, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1 INNER JOIN users AS u2 ON c1.user_id = u2.id WHERE u2.signup_date >= DATETIME('now', '-23 days')
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 INNER JOIN posts AS p8 ON l1.post_id = p8.id
SELECT u6.username, u6.id, f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 LEFT JOIN users AS u6 ON f1.follower_id = u6.id
SELECT p1.posted_at, u2.signup_date, u2.username, u2.country_code FROM posts AS p1 LEFT JOIN users AS u2 ON p1.user_id = u2.id
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 INNER JOIN posts AS p6 ON u1.id = p6.user_id WHERE p6.view_count = 964
SELECT u7.country_code, l1.post_id, u7.id, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 FULL JOIN users AS u7 ON l1.user_id = u7.id WHERE u7.signup_date >= DATETIME('now', '-2 days')
SELECT p5.view_count, c1.comment_text, c1.post_id, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN posts AS p5 ON c1.post_id = p5.id
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 INNER JOIN comments AS c7 ON p1.id = c7.post_id
SELECT u1.email, u1.signup_date, p1.content, p1.user_id FROM users AS u1 INNER JOIN posts AS p1 ON u1.id = p1.user_id
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 FULL JOIN likes AS l2 ON u1.id = l2.user_id
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 INNER JOIN users AS u7 ON l1.user_id = u7.id WHERE u7.email LIKE 'user%@%'
SELECT p1.user_id, p1.id, p1.view_count, l9.liked_at FROM posts AS p1 FULL JOIN likes AS l9 ON p1.id = l9.post_id WHERE l9.user_id > 823
SELECT p1.posted_at, u6.email, p1.view_count FROM posts AS p1 INNER JOIN users AS u6 ON p1.user_id = u6.id
SELECT u1.username, u1.id, u1.email, u1.is_verified FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id IN (SELECT sub_p.user_id FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.posted_at > DATETIME('now', '-23 days'))
SELECT c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.content LIKE '%a%')
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.id = l1.post_id AND sub_p.id <> 27)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.username <> 'test') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-17 days')
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.email LIKE 'user%@%')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.username <> '123') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-20 days')
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.username = 'admin')
SELECT c1.user_id, c1.created_at, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.is_verified = 1)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts AS inner_posts WHERE inner_posts.content <> 'test') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.posted_at > DATETIME('now', '-10 days')
SELECT u1.username AS user1, u2.username AS user2, u1.country_code FROM users AS u1 JOIN users AS u2 ON u1.country_code = u2.country_code AND u1.id <> u2.id
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.is_verified = 0)
SELECT u1.country_code, u1.signup_date, u1.id, u1.email FROM users AS u1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.user_id = u1.id AND sub_p.id = 998)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM comments AS inner_comments WHERE inner_comments.user_id > 823) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts AS inner_posts WHERE inner_posts.posted_at < DATETIME('now', '-9 days')) AS derived_table
SELECT u1.username AS user1, u2.username AS user2, u1.country_code FROM users AS u1 JOIN users AS u2 ON u1.country_code = u2.country_code AND u1.id <> u2.id
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id
SELECT l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.id <= 658)
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id LIMIT 11
SELECT p1.id AS post1, p2.id AS post2, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 JOIN posts AS p2 ON p1.user_id = p2.user_id AND p1.id < p2.id
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.id = c1.post_id AND sub_p.user_id < 725)

SELECT u1.country_code, u1.username, u1.id, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.username LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT u2.country_code, u2.username, u2.id, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.is_verified = 0
SELECT p1.content, p1.user_id, p1.view_count FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.view_count <= 737 UNION ALL SELECT p2.content, p2.user_id, p2.view_count FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.id > 361

SELECT p1.user_id, p1.content, p1.posted_at, p1.view_count FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at >= DATETIME('now', '-29 days') UNION SELECT p2.user_id, p2.content, p2.posted_at, p2.view_count FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.id >= 979 ORDER BY user_id
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.liked_at, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id >= 362 UNION ALL SELECT l2.user_id, l2.liked_at, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.post_id < 914
SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.user_id, p1.view_count FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id <> 626 UNION SELECT p2.posted_at, p2.user_id, p2.view_count FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.view_count <= 106
SELECT c1.user_id, c1.id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.created_at <= DATETIME('now', '-15 days') UNION SELECT c2.user_id, c2.id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.id >= 308
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.user_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at > DATETIME('now', '-13 days') UNION SELECT l2.post_id, l2.user_id, l2.liked_at FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.post_id = 641
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at < DATETIME('now', '-21 days') UNION SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.post_id <> 455
SELECT c1.post_id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.id = 926 UNION ALL SELECT c2.post_id, c2.comment_text FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.post_id <= 312 ORDER BY post_id LIMIT 25
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at <= DATETIME('now', '-22 days') UNION SELECT l2.post_id, l2.liked_at FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.post_id >= 327

SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.user_id, p1.view_count, p1.content FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.user_id > 431 UNION ALL SELECT p2.posted_at, p2.user_id, p2.view_count, p2.content FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.content <> 'user'

SELECT u1.is_verified, u1.country_code, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.username <> 'admin' UNION SELECT u2.is_verified, u2.country_code, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.email <> 'user25@example.com' LIMIT 29
SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.id >= 423 UNION SELECT c2.comment_text, c2.user_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.comment_text = '123'

SELECT u1.email, u1.id, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.is_verified = 1 UNION ALL SELECT u2.email, u2.id, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.country_code LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY email LIMIT 12
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at <= DATETIME('now', '-14 days') UNION SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id <= 819 ORDER BY liked_at

SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id <= 578 UNION SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.follower_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followed_at <= DATETIME('now', '-8 days') ORDER BY followed_at LIMIT 10

SELECT c1.created_at, c1.id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id <= 542 UNION ALL SELECT c2.created_at, c2.id, c2.comment_text FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.created_at <= DATETIME('now', '-25 days')

SELECT u1.username, u1.email, u1.country_code FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.signup_date >= DATETIME('now', '-26 days') UNION SELECT u2.username, u2.email, u2.country_code FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.is_verified = 0 ORDER BY username LIMIT 29

SELECT c1.id, c1.user_id, c1.created_at, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.comment_text = 'test' UNION ALL SELECT c2.id, c2.user_id, c2.created_at, c2.post_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.id <= 830
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id <> 896 UNION ALL SELECT l2.post_id, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id < 634
